productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Black Wallets
description: Crafted from soft leather, this black wallet from United Colours Of Benetton is fabulously stylish and well organised. This two fold wallet has lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday useDimensions: 12 cm X 9 cmHas two main compartmentsTwo credit card slots on either sideTwo mesh windows on either side for id cardsOverlaping flap on the left with four credit card slots and a mesh window for business cardsZippered compartment in the middle extending to both sides for coins Brand logo of Big Ben embossed on topCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
